title: abutilon arequipense
intro: Abutilon arequipense, also known as the Peruvian cotton plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Abutilon arequipense include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Abutilon arequipense can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and has been traditionally used in Peruvian folk medicine for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
